name: No Custom Font Family
description: Ensures no inline font-family styles are applied. Custom fonts break the platform's consistent look and may not render correctly on all devices.

name: No Custom Font Size
description: Ensures no inline font-size styles are applied. Custom font sizes override the platform's responsive typography and can harm readability.

name: No Custom Font Color
description: Ensures no inline color styles are applied. Custom colors can break accessibility contrast requirements and visual consistency.

name: No Copy-Paste Artifacts
description: Detects leftover markup from pasting content out of Word, Office, or AI tools. Catches mso-* styles, Mso* classes, <o:p> tags, <font> tags, and AI-generated data attributes like data-start and data-end.

name: No Paragraphs in List Items
description:
Ensures list items do not contain nested

tags, which cause extra spacing and inconsistent rendering across browsers.

name: Use Strong for Bold
description: Ensures bold text uses semantic <strong> tags instead of deprecated <b> tags or inline font-weight styles, improving accessibility and consistency.

name: H4 in Overview/Summary
description: Ensures section headers in overview and summary pages use <h4> tags to maintain a consistent heading hierarchy across the course.

name: Video Present
description: Verifies that every lecture and recitation vertical contains a video component. Missing videos indicate incomplete content.

name: Video Downloadable
description: Verifies that videos have download_video set to true so learners can download them for offline viewing.

name: Transcript Present
description: Verifies that every video has an associated transcript file. Transcripts are required for accessibility and aid comprehension.

name: Transcript Downloadable
description: Verifies that transcripts have download_track set to true so learners can download them for offline use.

name: Instructor Speaker Name
description: Checks that all transcripts use "INSTRUCTOR" as the speaker name for consistency across the course.

name: Slide Link Format
description: Checks that slide download links follow the standard format: "Slides: Lecture X.Y (PDF)" or "Lecture X.Y (PDF)".

name: Slide Link Separate Component
description: Verifies that the slide download link is placed in its own HTML component directly below the video, not embedded in other content.

name: Learner Not Student
description: Ensures inclusive language by checking that content uses "learner(s)" instead of "student", "user", or second-person "you".

name: Acronym Plural Consistency
description: Uses AI to check that acronyms are pluralized consistently throughout the course (e.g., always "APIs" or always "API's", not a mix).

name: AskTIM Chat Enabled
description: Checks that the AskTIM AI chat assistant is enabled on relevant content blocks via OL_OPENEDX_CHAT settings, giving learners on-demand help.

name: Bold Topics in Objectives
description: Checks that key topic names in learning objectives are bolded with <strong> tags for visual emphasis and scannability.

name: AskTIM on Objectives
description: Verifies that the AskTIM chat assistant is enabled on learning objectives pages so learners can ask questions about what they'll learn.

name: Summary Bolding Standards
description: Checks that bold formatting in summary takeaways follows course standards, using <strong> tags consistently for key terms.

name: Knowledge Check Naming
description: Ensures knowledge checks follow the standard naming pattern: "Knowledge Check N" or "Knowledge Check: Question N".

name: Sequential Numbering
description: Verifies that knowledge checks are numbered sequentially across each module with no gaps or duplicates.

name: Max Attempts
description: Ensures knowledge check problems allow exactly 3 attempts (max_attempts=3). Checkbox problems with more than 5 options are excluded and checked separately.

name: Complex Checkbox Attempts
description: Ensures checkbox problems with more than 5 answer options allow exactly 4 attempts, since these are harder and deserve an extra try.

name: Show Answer Setting
description: Ensures the "show answer" setting is configured to "after_all_attempts_or_correct" so learners must attempt the problem before seeing the answer.

name: Explanation Present
description: Verifies that every knowledge check has a solution block containing an explanation, so learners understand why the answer is correct.

name: Label Present
description: Ensures each knowledge check problem has a <label> element containing the question text, which is required for screen reader accessibility.

name: Correct Answer Marked
description: Verifies that every choice-based knowledge check has at least one answer marked as correct. Problems without a correct answer can never be completed.

name: Knowledge Check Explanation Quality
description: Uses AI to evaluate whether solution explanations are detailed enough to help learners understand the concept, not just the correct answer.

name: Assignment Explanation Quality
description: Uses AI to evaluate whether assignment solution explanations provide enough detail for learners to understand the underlying concepts.

name: No Truncated Answer Options
description: Uses AI to detect answer choices that appear incomplete or cut off during authoring, which can confuse learners.

name: No Truncated Answer Options
description: Uses AI to detect assignment answer choices that appear incomplete or cut off during authoring, which can confuse learners.

name: No Truncated Answer Options
description: Uses AI to detect problem bank answer choices that appear incomplete or cut off during authoring, which can confuse learners.

name: Explanation Present
description: Verifies that every problem in the shared problem bank has a solution block containing the word "Explanation".

name: Label Present
description: Ensures problem bank problems have a <label> or <div> element containing the question text for accessibility.

name: Correct Answer Marked
description: Verifies that every choice-based problem in the problem bank has at least one answer marked as correct.

name: Explanation Not Question Copy
description: Detects when the solution text is just a copy of the question text, which usually indicates the explanation was not actually written.

name: Library Content Explanation Quality
description: Uses AI to evaluate whether problem bank solution explanations are detailed enough to support deeper learning beyond just knowing the answer.

name: Assignment Naming
description: Ensures assignments follow the standard naming pattern: "Assignment N: Part N" for consistency across the course.

name: Question Numbering
description: Verifies that assignment questions are numbered sequentially from "Question 1" through "Question N" with no gaps or duplicates.

name: Multiple Choice Attempts
description: Ensures multiple-choice assignment problems allow exactly 2 attempts, balancing learner practice with assessment rigor.

name: Checkbox Attempts
description: Ensures standard checkbox assignment problems allow exactly 3 attempts, since selecting multiple correct answers is harder.

name: Complex Checkbox Attempts
description: Ensures checkbox problems with more than 5 answer options allow exactly 4 attempts, since these are significantly harder.

name: Problem Bank 2-Option MC Attempts
description: Ensures multiple-choice problems from problem banks with only 2 options allow exactly 1 attempt, since a second try would be a guaranteed correct answer.

name: Numerical Input Attempts
description: Ensures numerical input assignment problems allow exactly 3 attempts, giving learners room to correct calculation errors.

name: Show Answer Setting
description: Ensures the "show answer" setting is configured to "after_all_attempts_or_correct" so learners must try the problem before seeing the answer.

name: Explanation Present
description: Verifies that every assignment problem has a complete solution explanation to support learning from mistakes.

name: Explanation Not Question Copy
description: Detects when the question text was accidentally copied into the explanation field instead of writing an actual explanation.

name: Overview and Summary Pages
description: Verifies that each assignment includes both an overview page (introducing the assignment) and a summary page (wrapping it up).

name: Assignment Not Blank
description: Detects assignment sections that have no content, which usually indicates incomplete course development.

name: Label Present
description: Ensures each assignment problem has a <label> element containing the question text, which is required for screen reader accessibility.

name: Correct Answer Marked
description: Verifies that every choice-based assignment problem has at least one answer marked as correct. Problems without a correct answer can never be completed.

name: Notebook Links
description: When a Jupyter notebook is referenced in an assignment, verifies that the link points to the correct notebook file.

name: Lecture Naming
description: Ensures lectures follow the standard naming pattern: "L X.Y" followed by the topic name (e.g., "L 1.2 Introduction to Python").

name: Overview Present
description: Verifies that each lecture includes an overview page with learning objectives so learners know what to expect.

name: Summary Present
description: Verifies that each lecture includes a summary page to reinforce key concepts covered in the lecture.

name: Summary Key Takeaways
description: Checks that each lecture summary includes a list of key takeaways to help learners remember the most important points.

name: Overview Bold Title
description: Checks that the lecture title is bolded in the overview page for visual prominence and consistent formatting.

name: Overview Bold Professor
description: Checks that the professor's name is bolded in the lecture overview page for consistent formatting.

name: Video Duration
description: Checks that lecture videos are between 5 and 10 minutes long. Shorter videos may lack depth; longer ones reduce learner engagement.

name: Title Matches Video
description: Verifies that the unit title matches the embedded video title, catching cases where videos were placed in the wrong unit.

name: Lecture Not Blank
description: Detects lecture units that have no content, which usually indicates incomplete course development.

name: Recitation Naming
description: Ensures recitations follow the standard naming pattern: "R X.Y" followed by the topic name (e.g., "R 1.2 Data Wrangling Practice").

name: Overview Present
description: Verifies that each recitation includes an overview page introducing what will be covered.

name: Summary Present
description: Verifies that each recitation includes a summary page to reinforce key concepts.

name: Overview Bold Title
description: Checks that the recitation title is bolded in the overview page for consistent formatting.

name: Overview Bold Professor
description: Checks that the professor's name is bolded in the recitation overview page for consistent formatting.

name: Video Duration
description: Checks that recitation videos are between 5 and 10 minutes long to maintain learner engagement.

name: Title Matches Video
description: Verifies that the unit title matches the embedded video title, catching misplaced videos.

name: Module Summary Exists
description: Verifies that each module has a summary page providing a wrap-up of the module's content.

name: Survey Link Present
description: Checks that the module summary includes a feedback survey link so learners can share their experience.

name: Dashboard Link Present
description: Checks that the module summary includes a link back to the course dashboard for easy navigation.

name: Resources Tab Exists
description: Verifies that the course includes a Resources tab where learners can find supplemental materials.

name: Glossary Tab Exists
description: Verifies that the course includes a Glossary tab defining key terms used throughout the course.

name: Attributions Tab Exists
description: Checks for an Attributions tab that credits third-party content used in the course.

name: Glossary Course Name
description: Verifies that the glossary page references the correct course name, catching cases where a glossary was copied from another course.

name: Homework Grading Weight
description: Ensures the Homework grading category is weighted at 20% of the total grade.

name: Assignment Grading Weight
description: Ensures the Assignment grading category is weighted at 80% of the total grade.

name: Self-Paced Mode
description: Ensures the course is set to self-paced mode, allowing learners to progress at their own speed.

name: Start Date Future
description: Warns if the course start date is in the future, which may prevent learners from accessing content.

name: Beta Days Early
description: Ensures days_early_for_beta is set to 365 so beta testers can access the course a full year before the start date.

name: Discussions Disabled
description: Ensures the global Discussions tab is hidden, since this course uses alternative discussion mechanisms.

name: No Discussions in Sections
description: Ensures no individual sections have discussion_enabled set to true, preventing stray discussion threads in the course content.

name: Image Alt Text
description: Ensures every tag has a non-empty alt attribute so screen readers can describe images to visually impaired learners.

name: No Empty Links
description: Ensures every <a> tag has visible link text or an aria-label so screen readers can describe the link's purpose.

name: Static File Links Valid
description: Verifies that all links pointing to /static/ files actually reference files that exist in the course export.

name: Video Has edX ID
description: Ensures every video component has a non-empty edxVideoId. Missing IDs mean the video won't play on the platform.

name: No Empty HTML Components
description: Detects HTML components that are blank or contain only whitespace, which appear as empty space to learners.

name: No Duplicate Choices
description: Detects multiple-choice and checkbox problems that have identical answer choices, which confuse learners and indicate a copy-paste error.

name: No Single-Choice Questions
description: Ensures multiple-choice problems have at least 2 answer choices. A single choice makes the question trivial.

name: Links Open New Window
description: Ensures links to Jupyter notebooks (.ipynb) and PDF slides open in a new window (target="_blank") so learners don't lose their place in the course.

name: Chapters Have Content
description: Verifies that every chapter contains at least one sequential (subsection). Empty chapters indicate incomplete course structure.

name: Sequential Ordering Consistent
description: Checks that subsections within each chapter follow consistent numbering without unexpected gaps.

name: No Paste Artifacts in Problems
description: Detects Word/Office or AI (ChatGPT) copy-paste artifacts in problem XML, such as mso-* styles, data-start attributes, or ChatGPT wrapper markup.

name: No Empty Paragraphs
description:
Detects empty paragraph tags (

,

, or

 

) that create unwanted blank space in the content.

name: No Empty Choices
description: Detects answer choices that are blank or contain only whitespace, which usually indicates the problem was not fully authored.

name: Draft Content Warning
description: Reports when the course export contains unpublished draft content in the drafts/ directory. Drafts may need to be published or removed before launch.

name: Transcripts Not Empty
description: Ensures transcript SRT files contain real content (at least 10 lines) and are not empty or placeholder-only files.
